messages.content:
As a restaurant owner, write a professional email to the supplier to get these products every week: 

- Wine (x10)
- Eggs (x24)
- Bread (x12)

Subject: Weekly Standing Order for Restaurant Supplies

Dear [Supplier's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to establish a consistent weekly order for certain products that are essential to the operations of our restaurant, [Your Restaurant's Name].

Having been satisfied with the quality and service from your company, we would like to set up a recurring order for the following items, which we will require on a weekly basis:

- Wine (x10 bottles)
- Eggs (x24 dozen)
- Bread (x12 loaves)

We anticipate that a steady supply of these products will ensure the smooth running of our kitchen and bar, providing our customers with the exceptional experience they have come to expect from us.

Would you kindly confirm if you can fulfill this standing order? We would appreciate delivery on [preferred delivery day, e.g., Monday mornings], which will allow us to maintain our fresh product inventory for the week.

Please let us know the following:

1. The total cost for the recurring order based on our specified quantities.
2. Any discounts that may apply due to the standing nature of the order.
3. The earliest start date for this arrangement.
4. Your preferred method of payment and terms of payment.

Similarly, should there be any changes to product availability or if you require any adjustment in scheduling, please communicate this to us promptly so we can plan accordingly.

We would like to confirm this order by [date you wish to confirm by], so please provide all the necessary information before this date to ensure a seamless transition into this weekly standing order.

Thank you for your continued support and attention to this request. We look forward to strengthening our business relationship.

Warm regards,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Restaurant's Name]
[Your Contact Information]
Make it short by removing unnecessary stuff

Subject: Weekly Order Request for Wine, Eggs, and Bread

Dear [Supplier's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I'd like to set up a recurrent weekly order for [Your Restaurant's Name] as outlined below:

- Wine: 10 bottles
- Eggs: 24 dozen
- Bread: 12 loaves

Please confirm the availability of these items for weekly delivery, the total cost, and any applicable discounts for a standing order. Our preferred delivery day is on [insert preferred delivery day].

Kindly let us know the earliest we can start with this arrangement and your payment terms.

Looking forward to your prompt response.

Best,
[Your Full Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Restaurant's Name]
[Your Contact Information]
Make it casual

Subject: Weekly Supply Order: Wine, Eggs, & Bread

Hey [Supplier's First Name],

Hope things are going great on your end. We're planning our weekly supplies for [Your Restaurant's Name] and would like to count on you for a few staple items:

- 10 bottles of wine
- 24 dozen eggs
- 12 loaves of bread

Can we make this a regular thing every [preferred delivery day]? Just let me know the cost and if there are any perks for us ordering every week.

When can you get us started on this schedule? Also, what are your payment options?

Thanks a ton!

Cheers,
[Your First Name]
[Your Restaurant's Name]
[Your Phone Number]
Neglect the mail format

Hey [Supplier's First Name],

Hope you're good. We're looking to get a few things from you on the regular for the restaurant:

- Wine: Need 10 bottles weekly.
- Eggs: Hook us up with 24 dozen every week.
- Bread: We'll take 12 loaves each time.

What do you say? Can we have this stuff delivered every [preferred delivery day]? Give me a shout with the price and if there’s a regulars discount or something.

Let me know when we can kick this off and how you like to handle payment.

Catch you later,

[Your First Name]
I am sending this on whats app. So use internet slang

Hey [Supplier's First Name],

Hope you're all good! Quick one, we're setting up a weekly must-have list for the restaurant, and we need:

- 10 bottles of vino 🍷
- A cool 24 dozen eggs 🥚
- 12 fresh loaves of bread 🍞

Can you sort us out every [preferred delivery day]? Hit me with the deets on cost and if there's like a loyalty discount or something.

When's good for you to start? And payment-wise, what works best?

Catch ya later,

[Your First Name]✌️
Dont write in a mail format

Hey [Supplier's First Name]! 😊

Just wanted to lock down our weekly stash for the restaurant. Thinking we're gonna need:

🍷 Wine - We'll need like 10 bottles to keep the vibes right.
🥚 Eggs - Gotta have 24 dozen, our omelettes are no joke!
🍞 Bread - Can never have enough, 12 loaves should do the trick.

What's the damage ($$$) gonna be on a weekly basis? Any chance we can work out a deal for making it a regular gig?

Let's aim to get the ball rolling by [preferred delivery day]. Oh, and for payments, what's the best game plan for you?

Cheers! 🙌

[Your First Name]
Make it absolute formal

Dear [Supplier's First Name],

I trust this message finds you in the best of health and spirits. I am contacting you to formally request a recurring order for essential items for my restaurant, [Your Restaurant's Name]. Kindly find the list of requested items below:

- Wine: 10 bottles
- Eggs: 24 dozen
- Bread: 12 loaves
We would appreciate if these items could be delivered weekly on [preferred delivery day]. Please inform me of the total costs associated with this order, including any potential discounts for regular purchases.

Furthermore, could you please clarify your available payment methods and terms for such transactions?

I would be grateful if you could commence this standing order at your earliest convenience. Your prompt response would be highly appreciated.

Yours sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Position at Your Restaurant]
[Your Contact Information]
Make it short

Dear [Supplier's First Name],

Please establish a weekly order for [Your Restaurant's Name] as follows:

- Wine: 10 bottles
- Eggs: 24 dozen
- Bread: 12 loaves

Requesting delivery every [preferred delivery day]. Kindly provide total cost, discount details, payment methods, and terms.

Awaiting your confirmation for an immediate start.

Regards,
[Your Full Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Contact Information]
Add some (small ) details

Dear [Supplier's First Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request a weekly standing order for [Your Restaurant's Name], which will greatly help us maintain our stock of essentials. Please provide the following items on a weekly basis:

- Wine: A selection of 10 bottles, preferably a mix of red and white as per our previous discussions.
- Eggs: 24 dozen, ensuring they are fresh and locally sourced if possible.
- Bread: 12 artisanal loaves, with a variety of whole grain and sourdough.

We would like these items delivered every [preferred delivery day], starting from the next available delivery slot. Please send me an invoice with the total cost, including any standard discounts that we may be eligible for as regular customers.

Additionally, could you confirm the payment methods you accept and outline the payment terms we should adhere to?

I look forward to your prompt confirmation and the start of our weekly delivery arrangement.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Restaurant's Name]
[Your Contact Information]
Not that much details

Dear [Supplier's First Name],

I'd like to set up a weekly standing order for the following:

- Wine: 10 bottles (mixed varieties)
- Eggs: 24 dozen (fresh)
- Bread: 12 loaves (mixed types)

Please confirm cost, any possible discounts for regular orders, and payment terms. Delivery every [preferred delivery day].

Looking for a prompt start.

Best,
[Your Full Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Restaurant's Name]
[Your Contact Information]
